channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Utility cover leaking across high street for 2 weeks, 9th July
item.description:
Utility cover leaking across high street for 2 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped outside 170 Old Woolwich Road, 9th July
item.description:
Bags of rubbish just to the right of 170 Old Woolwich Road seems to be a near daily occurrence, maybe one for Enviro Crime to investigate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs shoots pruning, 9th July
item.description:
The shoots on this tree outside number 6 Wickham Way need pruning. We can't see when coming out of the drive - dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Wickham Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s no. 12, 9th July
item.description:
Uneven paving - major trip hazard
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees curbside 100 - 140 Kilburn park road NW6 5FQ, 9th July
item.description:
Overhanging tree branches are obstructing the public footway at curbside 100 to 140 Kilburn park road. The branches have grown too low and are forcing pedestrians to duck or step into the road. Please arrange for a crown lift of the tree to restore a safe and clear walking path.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tip, 9th July
item.description:
Waste not cleared for weeks now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmbury View, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This London plane tree needs repaving at its base: removal of constrictive paving slabs, and especially of recent new tarmacing over its roots! There are FAR TOO FEW trees hereeabouts and you seem intent on killing this one too!, 9th July
item.description:
The pavement is deep and wide here, there is scope and necessity for proper care for the tree and/or green infrastructure. The wider junction is a disgrace in 2026 for its lack of green infrastructure: one massive heat island. Stand and look at it! I know this is mostly TfL land but not all of it! Meanwhile, you are killing this tree with weirdly reactive moves instead of engaging with it properly. The tree civilises the street, work with it!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prioress Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime & Voi Blocking public highway, 9th July
item.description:
Lime & Voi Blocking public highway ongoing issue need to be better managed by hackney council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Appold Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint spillage, 9th July
item.description:
Dried paint spillage at the location junction of Mayes Hill Road and Hillside Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillside Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tip on pavament, 9th July
item.description:
Its been there for few weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glaserton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concrete slurry not cleaned up by Thames Water contractors, 9th July
item.description:
Thames Water works on pavement completed and site cleared but they did not clean the road where slurry has travelled towards surface water drain.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 293, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th July
item.description:
The fly tipping in the estate has not been picked up all week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th July
item.description:
The fly tipping in the estate has not been picked up all week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th July
item.description:
The fly tipping in the estate has not been picked up all week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Dumped bedding including duvets and sheets, 9th July
item.description:
Dumped bedding including duvets and sheets at the rear of 105 Cotmandene Crescent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105-107, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping ongoing, 9th July
item.description:
Keeps on coming up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa, 9th July
item.description:
Wrongly resolved - it is still here. It is encouraging litter and people are sitting until the early hours of the morning making noise in a residential area. Been here for over 2 weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millers Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A fridge freezer has been dumped in the bushes and there is smashed glass on the highway., 9th July
item.description:
In addition to the black bags already dumped in this location there is now a fridge freezer and smashed glass on the highway. Local kids are also climbing in and out of it. !!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, The Avenue, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint spillage, 9th July
item.description:
Paint has been dropped on the road surface around and on the crossing and pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, May's Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp number 2 outside 3 & 4 Blakeney Close, 9th July
item.description:
The lamp flashes on and off all night and disturbs sleep for residents. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bergholt Mews, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
